suspicious_activity.narrative: Brandon Reyes (ID: CUST_0090) conducted 43 transactions totaling $153,932.03 between the review period. Activity indicates structuring at Medium risk. Key indicators: 4 transactions in $8,000-$9,999 band, Aggregate total $153,932.03 across 43 transactions. Transactions lack clear economic purpose, consistent with suspicious activity under the Bank Secrecy Act, 31 CFR 1020.320.
key_indicators: Possible smurfing — deliberate sub-threshold structuring detected
